title: VERTICES PARTNERS, CAM act on Prayaan Capital ₹110 crore Series A fundraise
description: Prayaan Capital Private Limited has raised ₹110 crore ($12.1million) from a Series A fundraise led by Peak XV Partners.VERTICES PARTNERS advised Prayaan Capital on this fundraise.The transaction was led by Vinayak Burman (Founder and Managing Partner) and Manu Varghese (Partner), along with a team that included Shagun Rathi (Senor Associate) and Associates Srishti Singh and Stuti Jain.Vinayak Burman, Manu VargheseVERTICES, SAMVĀD act on Rangarajan Krishnan acquiring controlling stake in Prayaan
